◣◢ MILLENNIUM v1.0.0
Features How it works GitHub Download
v1.0.0 · Windows & Android · 100% local network

Your clipboard, across the room.

Millennium Clipboard moves text, files and your clipboard between Windows and Android on the same Wi-Fi. No cloud, no accounts, no sign-in — nothing ever leaves your network.

▸ Download for Windows View on GitHub Windows 10/11 · ~10 MB · no installer
Why it's different

Built for one job: your devices, one Wi-Fi, zero friction.

Everything runs peer-to-peer on your local network. There is no server in the middle and no account to create.

📡

LAN-only, zero cloud

Devices talk directly over your Wi-Fi. Your text and files never touch a third-party server.

📋

Text · files · clipboard

Send a note, drop a batch of files, or keep the clipboard in sync between machines.

🛰️

Auto-discovery

Peers find each other automatically over mDNS. On locked-down networks, add one by IP or scan a QR.

🔒

Encrypted & pinned

Every transfer runs over HTTPS with a self-signed certificate per device, pinned by fingerprint.

🪟

Windows & Android

A tidy desktop app plus a phone build — send both ways, straight into your Downloads.

⟳

Auto-updates

New versions verify their own hash before installing, so updating is one click and tamper-evident.

A look inside

A clean, deliberate interface — no dashboards, no noise.

Send text

Pick a peer, type, transmit.

The grid on the left shows every device on your network. Choose one, drop in a message or a link, and hit send — or Ctrl+Enter.

Send files

Drag, drop, done.

Drop files onto the window and they queue up instantly — the box tells you how many are ready and the list scrolls on its own, so the Transmit button never runs away.

Your rules

Settings that stay out of the way.

Choose a download folder, toggle auto-accept from favorites, start with Windows, close to tray — tucked into collapsible sections you open only when you need them.

How it works

Running in under a minute.

Install on both

Grab the Windows app and, if you want, the Android build. No account, no setup wizard.

Same Wi-Fi

Open both on the same network. They discover each other and show up in the grid on their own.

Share anything

Type and transmit, or drag files across. It lands on the other device — clipboard sync optional.

Download · v1.0.0

Get Millennium Clipboard

The first official release. A single Windows executable — no installer, no telemetry, no account. Runs entirely on your LAN.
